title: hieracium levicaule subsp. pullulum
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. pullulum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, thanks to its expectorant and bronchodilatory effects. Hieracium levicaule subsp. pullulum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and offer relief from various health conditions.
